name: YUS International Group Limited
summary: YUS International Group Limited does not have significant operations. The company intends to seek and identify appropriate business opportunity for the development of new line of business. Previously, it provided brainstorming, storyboarding, commercials and advertisement production, and media planning services to advertisers in Hong Kong. The company was formerly known as Asian Trends Media Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to YUS International Group Limited in March 2013. YUS International Group Limited was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
